heading: Repealed. ,Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 1041, § 5370A Stat. 641
label: 51 to 57 Repealed. ,Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 1041, § 5370A Stat. 641
notes: Section 51, , , related to pay of master amorer at Springfield Armory.act Aug. 5, 1882, ch. 39522 Stat. 299
Section 52, , , related to pay of clerks at Springfield Armory.act June 23, 1874, ch. 48618 Stat. 282
Section 53, R.S. § 1665, required an annual account of expenses of national armories, together with an account of arms made and repaired thereon.
Section 54, acts , ; , , related to accounts of cost of type and experimental manufacture of guns and other articles.Aug. 18, 1890, ch. 797, § 226 Stat. 320Aug. 7, 1946, ch. 770, § 1(52)60 Stat. 870
Section 55, R.S. § 1666, authorized Secretary of War to abolish useless or unnecessary arsenals.
Section 56, R.S. § 1669, provided for forfeitures by reason of misconduct of workmen in armories.
Section 57, R.S. § 1671, exempted from jury duty all artificers and workmen employed in armories and arsenals, of the United States.
